category_sources: current_curation.category_path is media; source_facts.description identifies a dynamic pixel format translation library
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is babl; official GEGL/babl page uses lowercase babl branding
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official babl documentation page with features, reference, usage, and glossary sections
repo_sources: Official babl page states the main repository is hosted by GNOME and gives the GNOME GitLab clone URL
